# Chapter One: The Opening

This file is real Markdown saved with a .txt extension by mistake. The sniffer should upgrade it to the Markdown parser via the multi-signal score.

- A bulleted list
- Another bullet
- A third bullet

Here is some **bold text** and a [link to somewhere](https://example.com).

```js
const code = "fenced block";
```
